case_title: KENDRICK HUEY VS. JOE TOBONI ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HUEY, KENDRICK AS TO DEFENDANT TOBONI, JOE AKA JOSEPH P. TOBONI DBA JT BUILDERS 2290 3RD STREET LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEY, KENDRICK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF KENDRICK HUEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOE TOBONI AKA JOSEPH P. TOBONI DBA JT BUILDERS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROSS SCHOMAKER. DEFENDANT 2290 3RD ST LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROSS SCHOMAKER (BUILDING MANAGER). DEFENDANT ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS THE CASE BASED ON PRIOR CASE CUD-22-669960 (2290 3RD STREET LLC VS. KENDRICK HUEY ET AL.) IS DENIED BY THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2023 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEY, KENDRICK AS TO DEFENDANT TOBONI, JOE AKA JOSEPH P. TOBONI DBA JT BUILDERS
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY HUEY, KENDRICK TOBONI, JOE AKA JOSEPH P. TOBONI DBA JT BUILDERS 2290 3RD STREET LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUEY, KENDRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOBONI, JOE AKA JOSEPH P. TOBONI DBA JT BUILDERS 2290 3RD STREET LLC PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANTS BREACH OF THE TERM OF THE LEASE. INSTEAD THE DEFENDANTS SHOWED THAT THE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE LEASE TERMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-11-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTACTED AND LEFT VOICEMAIL TO PLAINTIFF TO INFORM REGARDING OF THE CONTINUANCE. DEFENDANTS DOESN'T HAVE PHONE NUMBER ON FILE. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
